authorization_phrase: Authorize s21-d1 broader-universe weekly relative-strength rotation availability probe + DR9 audit framework only.
clean_generalization_statement: This is the CLEAN generalization test that the s20 P11 flagged as the way to resolve the selection caveat: a FRESH never-tested 48-name universe, identical locked mechanic, zero overlap. It is NOT tuning and NOT a revN of any prior candidate; s17/s18/s19/s20 are frozen and untouched.
contingency_tree: Per-symbol DR9 FAIL (continuity/gap/quality/split): drop the symbol, pull the next clean name from RESERVE (in order), re-audit; document every substitution. The universe must remain a PRE-COMMITTED list -- no performance-based selection.
If >4 primary names fail DR9 (universe would fall below 44 after using RESERVE): HALT and report; reassess universe composition (a fresh RUN_BOOK), do NOT proceed to PLAN on a depleted basket.
Vendor/API failure (auth, rate-limit, missing history): treat as a BLOCKER; HALT; report; do NOT fabricate or substitute data.
Any symbol whose listing post-dates 2019-01-02 (row_count < 1759): drop to RESERVE (cross-sectional ranking needs full aligned history).
Calendar misalignment across symbols: HALT at fetch/BUILD (no silent reindex).

k9_k13_dr10_reachability_discipline.dr10_v2: (annual_turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05) -> REJECT_FAST (by-ref 78cd22e); weekly breadth raises turnover but cost_drag expected ~1-3% (<5%), as in s20
k9_k13_dr10_reachability_discipline.edge_reproven: the edge is re-proven from scratch at s21 P6 IS; NOT inherited from s18/s19/s20
k9_k13_dr10_reachability_discipline.k13: 5 pre-committed UNSEARCHED DA22 folds (warmup 0-159; F1 160-478..F5 1436-1758) on the shared 1759-bar calendar; >=3/5 + aggregate>0 + K9; no per-fold refit
k9_k13_dr10_reachability_discipline.k9_aggregate: IS >=100 expected to clear comfortably (s20 union measured IS 284 at the same breadth)
k9_k13_dr10_reachability_discipline.oos_k9: OOS >=50/y (>=100/2y); 48-name top-8 expected ~55-75/y (s20 measured 67.2/y) -- but UNPROVEN on fresh names; measured signal-only pre-SEAL at the s21 DRAFT (the LESSON_S20_D1_003 gate) and binding with P&L at P10

next_authorization_options.exact_phrase: Authorize s21-d1 fresh-universe Tiingo split_only fetch + DR9 result sealing workflow only.
next_authorization_options.title: Fetch + DR9 audit + conditional seal (the actual data acquisition)

per_symbol_dr9_checks.calendar_alignment: all symbols must share the identical 1759-bar NYSE calendar (required for cross-sectional ranking; asserted at fetch + BUILD)
per_symbol_dr9_checks.documented_split_event_consistency: ratio ~1.0 across each documented split boundary (band 0.85-1.15)

purpose.breadth_matches_s20: 48-name pool at fixed M=8 -- same breadth that gave s20 OOS 67.2/y -> OOS-K9 reachability expected comparable on fresh names (binding only at the eventual P10).
purpose.detail: s20 OOS_CONFIRMED the weekly RS edge on the 48-name s18+s19 UNION, proving breadth solves the OOS-K9 blocker -- but because that union INCLUDES the known-OOS-good s18 basket, it was a SAMPLE-SIZE demonstration, NOT clean generalization (LESSON_S20_D1_002). s21 runs the IDENTICAL byte-locked mechanic on a FRESH 48-name universe with ZERO overlap vs s17/s18/s19, so a positive result would be genuine independent generalization evidence (no selection bias). A null/negative s21 = the edge is partly universe-specific (accepted, informative).
purpose.headline: T1 CLEAN GENERALIZATION TEST -- resolves the s20 selection caveat.
purpose.replication_not_tuning: Mechanic byte-identical to s18/s19/s20 (126-21 / R=5 / top-8 / M=8 / long-only / relative-rank exit / split_only / tiingo / warmup 160). ONLY the universe differs. NOT a tune, NOT a revN. s18/s19/s20 frozen.

split_checks.audit_rule: the DR9 audit verifies ALL Tiingo-reported splitFactors per symbol (NOT only the pre-listed) -- any forward split/spin-off encoded in the splitFactor stream is applied under split_only and its return-continuity verified (band 0.85-1.15); previously this caught NFLX 10:1 + HON 1.061 in s19
split_checks.spinoff_note: spin-offs encoded by Tiingo in the splitFactor stream are return-continuous under split_only and PASS the consistency audit; any symbol with a messy reverse-split + multi-spinoff history that breaks continuity is dropped to RESERVE

title: s21-d1 broader-universe weekly RS rotation availability-probe + DR9-audit RUN_BOOK (sealed; framework ONLY; NO fetch; T1 CLEAN generalization test; fresh 48-name zero-overlap universe; replication-not-tuning)

vendor_and_window.adjustment_convention: split_only (raw OHLCV x cumulative(1/splitFactor) for splits strictly after each date; volume / factor; dividends NOT adjusted)
vendor_and_window.api_key_handling: TIINGO_API_KEY from environment ONLY; never printed or exposed

zero_overlap_attestation.note: asserted programmatically against the frozen s18+s19 CONFIG universes; s17 originals are a subset of s18
